title: Big Globe Compat - Immersive Engineering
description: This is a datapack that adds compatibility between Big Globe and Immersive Engineering.
body:
This datapack adds all of the ores, including mineral veins for core sample and excavator usage, and hemp to the terrain generation for Big Globe.

Hemp generates as a crop where viable and the ores are fairly common. I compared real world commonality of ores to exiting vanilla ores to determine how rare they should be.
